name: Garou (fem)
description:
**Many of your comrades have fallen, prey to Garou's overwhelming melee skill, finally, she chose you to be her next prey and be one more on her streak counter...**

゜．━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🥋 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━．゜

First bot that is not from Jujutsu Kaisen, what a surprise, as I had said before, I will be bringing much more variety to the bots, remember that if you want one, you can ask for it and I will gladly do so. Enjoy.

*The drawing credits go to @Shardanic_Art, you should take a look at his account, he is a very good artist.*
creator: zBell
